compiled_state.title: E5b: rewire rebar_reconciler off compat shims (ticket_reducer->rebar.reducer, bare event_append->in-package write); reconcile launch via sys.executable
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
E5b COMPLETE + LIVE-DIG PROBE PASSED (commit fb1b7fa7, on main).

REWIRE: reconciler off bare event_append/ticket_reducer shims -> in-package rebar._store (lock+write) and rebar.reducer; reconcile launch python3 -> sys.executable (reconciler now imports rebar at runtime); defensive rebar bootstrap in __main__.py. Event bytes UNCHANGED (json.dumps ensure_ascii=False, insertion key order; NOT routed through canonical stage_and_commit). LockTimeout->TimeoutError contract preserved.

VALIDATION (offline): 893 targeted tests green; full non-integration suite 1808 passed/0 failed; opus review APPROVE-WITH-NITS (MAJOR LockTimeout drift FIXED, +portability bootstrap +scandir nit).

LIVE-DIG PROBE (user-authorized this session; --filter-local-ids scoping => exactly ONE throwaway issue ever touched, 973 production mutations filtered out: 'FILTERED PASS: not a production reconciliation'):
- Outbound rebar->Jira (DIG-5764, create+converge): summary OK, description(+bullets) OK, issuetype task->Task OK, priority 1->High OK, labels [probe-rewire,e5b-validation,rebar-id:...] OK, status open->To Do OK, comment(+reconciler-echo) OK. ALL FIELDS CORRECT.
- Inbound Jira->rebar: edited DIG-5764 via acli (summary/desc/label/comment/transition); filtered reconcile applied via the rewired _write_event_file -> inbound label landed locally; the written EDIT event is BYTE-CORRECT (keys [timestamp,uuid,event_type,env_id,author,data], spaced+unsorted serialization, source:inbound, author:reconciler) == byte-identical to the old bare module. Inbound summary/comment pull is pre-existing reconciler bidir/differ policy (inbound_differ.py UNCHANGED by E5b) + a transient navasage REST timeout, NOT a rewire regression.
- Cleanup: acli delete DIG-5764 -> confirmed gone; JQL sweep for ZZZ-PROBE/probe-rewire/e5b-validation => zero residue.

GATE SATISFIED: the rewire preserves the Jira compatibility surface (differ/field-maps/adf/acli-ops byte-identical; only event-write plumbing + launch changed, both proven identical). Closing.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
